compatStatus: Legacy monthly and unmigrated balances explicitly preserved.
retirementStatus: Old sales retire immediately; data paths retire only after migration/final paid_until.
newRiskSignals: Task 1 lacks real MySQL multi-connection evidence for savepoints, row locks, and CHECK enforcement because local test credentials are rejected.
Registered payment catalog versions must remain readable until no pending order references them.
Task 3 uses a temporary `_credit_wallet_cents` serializer bridge until Task 5 updates callers explicitly.
Task 3 terminal job/refund locking lacks real InnoDB multi-session evidence.
Task 4 full-batch apply requires explicit row/item limits and still lacks real production sizing or InnoDB evidence.
